prompt: A high-concept, cinematic macro photograph of extreme wealth inequality. A colossal, sharp golden monolith, textured with fine geometric engravings, occupies the top 45% of the frame. Its lethal, needle-like point is pressing with immense gravitational force into the center of a fragile, translucent sphere that contains a dense, swirling cloud of 7.8 billion tiny, flickering white sparks. The sphere is visibly deforming and showing hairline fractures under the weight. The background is a vast, cold void. Lighting is harsh and dramatic, creating a deep shadow that swallows the bottom of the sphere. 8k resolution, photorealistic textures of gold and cracked glass, profound atmospheric tension.
insight: The global top 1% holds 45% of all household wealth, creating a crushing gravitational imbalance that threatens the stability of the remaining 99%.
